text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, there are two kinds of<n>people in
this world.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Those who know when to swallow dried<n>squid...
and those who don't.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: If I'm being honest, I am the latter... Nomatter how much I chew, it just neverfeels right.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, a sympathetic face, I see.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then let us undertake this journey<n>together... A
journey to jaws strong<n>enough to bite through
even the Kraken<n>itself!
